name: 9 Point Flan
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Rum, or more to taste
recipeInstructions:
1 In a heavy skillet, slowly heat 3/4 cup sugar until melted and caramel-colored. Pour into a 5-cup baking dish and carefully swirl to line the dish with caramel. Set aside.
2 Beat egg yolks with 1/2 cup sugar. Add evaporated milk and rum to taste and beat well.
3 Turn custard into prepared baking dish.
4 Place dish in a pan of hot water and bake at 350°F about 1 hour, or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
5 Cool thoroughly at room temperature.
6 Unmold on a serving plate.
